title: Worms
description: Dig through different types of soil to find little worms crawling around.
body:
Dig through different types of soil to find little worms crawling around. Don't leave them in the sun too long, or they might dry out.

Try putting a worm on your fishing rod for increased luck. It seems those fish are like a juicy snack.

Word of the Earth is that worms like bone meal...
